creator: bileslav@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to feh from comment #7)

Hi Erwin,

Thanks for your reply. Here's my story in detail: https://www.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/1b80lpi/gpu_has_fallen_off_the_bus_a_sad_story_about_my/

I wrote that post before replacing the GPU with RX 6400. Not mentioned: with RX 560 I experienced some graphical glitches, which wasn't the case with identical setups on Arch and Void Linux.

BTW, several people wrote in the comments about a similar problem (crashes). Here's another thread: https://www.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/182k62e/freebsd_14_amdgpu_and_panic_reboots/

So in fact, this bug affects a few more people, they just didn't report here.
